signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), missing forecasts of 2.4% but signaling pickup amid Middle East oil shocks.**[1] | **YES** | **MED** confidence

Bank of Korea held policy rate at 2.5% for seventh meeting on April 10, 2026, citing inflation above 2% target due to oil costs and weak won (1,520/USD).[1][4] This March data—latest confirmed release per Stati
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active X-related market is "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by...?", with traders assigning 97% odds to resolution by December 31 amid $121M+ volume across 1346 X markets; no whale bets or tips specified, but real-time odds reflect crowd conviction on prolonged conflict.[1]
